overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity action game (Black Myth: Wukong) showing a warrior character with a staff exploring a snow-covered ancient East Asian temple complex. The character walks through stone gateways, crosses snowy courtyards, and ascends stairs toward temple halls while snow falls gently in a serene, overcast winter atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gateway entrance to snowy temple courtyard

events.description: character exits the dark stone archway into the open snowy temple courtyard
character passes by stationary monk figures in the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ancient stone gateway into the temple complex, staff carried on back

notable_agents.action: monk in grey robes standing still in the snow

entered.detail: ornate carved stone archway with hanging bronze bells
traditional curved temple roofs covered in snow visible through the gate
intricately carved stone walls lining the entrance corridor
traditional wooden temple structure with red pillars and snow-covered eaves

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone gateway with intricate carvings and hanging bronze bells. The character walks forward, emerging from the enclosed archway into a snowy temple courtyard. As the space opens up, snow-covered traditional temple buildings become visible in the distance, and monk figures stand silently in the snow to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: main temple courtyard with traditional halls

events.description: character adjusts path slightly right while approaching the main temple stairs

agents.ego_description: crossing the open snowy courtyard toward the main temple hall entrance

entered.detail: large traditional temple building with ornate roof and red wooden facade
traditional stone lanterns flanking the approach path
stone staircase leading up to the main entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open courtyard, leaving the gateway behind. The main temple hall dominates the view ahead, with its snow-laden roof and red wooden pillars. Stone lanterns mark the approach path as the character walks across the snow-covered ground toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: main temple entrance stairs and platform

events.description: character begins ascending the snow-dusted stone stairs toward the temple entrance
screen fades to black indicating a transition to a new area

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase leading to the temple's main entrance, passing stone railings

entered.detail: massive wooden entrance doors with lattice patterns and snow on the threshold
traditional bronze incense burner on the platform before the entrance
ornate carved stone railings lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase toward the temple entrance, flanked by stone railings and lanterns. The large wooden doors of the main hall loom ahead, with a bronze incense burner positioned on the platform. The segment ends with a fade to black as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple perimeter path with Buddha statue wall

events.description: character emerges from fade in a new location along a wall with large Buddha statues

agents.ego_description: walking along the temple perimeter path beside a wall adorned with large Buddha statues, staff ready

entered.detail: long stone wall featuring large seated Buddha statues in niches with golden halos
tiled roof of the temple structure covered in snow
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the character appears in a new area walking alongside a massive stone wall adorned with large Buddha statues. The path continues through the snow with temple buildings on one side and the ornate statue wall on the other, leading toward distant snow-covered mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from the enclosed confines of a stone gateway into the expansive, snow-covered grounds of an ancient temple complex. It begins within a narrow archway adorned with intricate carvings and bronze bells, moving forward as the space opens into a wide courtyard where silent monk figures stand amidst traditional buildings. As the character advances across the snowy ground, the view shifts toward a dominant temple hall with red wooden pillars and stone lanterns, leading the camera up a grand staircase toward large wooden doors and a bronze incense burner. The scene then transitions to a path flanked by a massive stone wall featuring towering Buddha statues, moving past ornate carvings toward a vista of distant, snow-capped mountains.
